AxReportDesign.Name: ReportDesign
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>09fd8d6f-23dd-4ebc-a9d1-5308e356a88c</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmPackingSlipId"> <Value>=Parameters!parmPackingSlipId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmDeliveryDate"> <Value>=Parameters!parmDeliveryDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateDP.KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="AccountRelation"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.AccountRelation</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyAddress"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.CompanyAddress</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyEmail"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.CompanyEmail</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyName"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.CompanyName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyPhone"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.CompanyPhone</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="DeliveryDate"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.DeliveryDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InventCertificateOfAnalysisId"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.InventCertificateOfAnalysisId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ItemId"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.ItemId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="KPMGCommon_InstrumentsEmployed_EN"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.KPMGCommon_InstrumentsEmployed_EN</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="KPMGCommon_InstrumentsEmployed_ES"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.KPMGCommon_InstrumentsEmployed_ES</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="NIFCompany"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.NIFCompany</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="PackingSlipId"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeader.1.PackingSlipId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> <DataSet Name="KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertifcateLinesTmp_DS"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmPackingSlipId"> <Value>=Parameters!parmPackingSlipId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmDeliveryDate"> <Value>=Parameters!parmDeliveryDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateDP.KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="InventCertificateOfAnalysisId"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.InventCertificateOfAnalysisId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ItemId"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.ItemId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="LimitValue"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.LimitValue</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="LowerLimit"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.LowerLimit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="LowerTolerance"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.LowerTolerance</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ProdId"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.ProdId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="StandardValue"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.StandardValue</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestId"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestName"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultCount"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResultCount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Int32</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultLabel"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResult:LABEL(InventTestOutcomeStatus)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultName"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResult:NAME(InventTestOutcomeStatus)</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultValueCount"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResultValueCount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Int32</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultValueOutcome"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResultValueOutcome</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultValueOutcomeCountNoOK"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResultValueOutcomeCountNoOK</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Int32</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultValueOutcomeCountOK"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResultValueOutcomeCountOK</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Int32</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultValueReal"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResultValueReal</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestResultValueRealCount"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestResultValueRealCount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestSequence"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestSequence</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Int32</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestUnit"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestUnit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TestUnitId"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.TestUnitId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="UpperLimit"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.UpperLimit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="UpperTolerance"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.UpperTolerance</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="VariableOutcomeIdStandard"> <DataField>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.1.VariableOutcomeIdStandard</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertifcateLinesTmp_DS</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <ReportSection> <Body> <ReportItems> <Textbox Name="Textbox8"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@SYS11549 & ": " & First(Fields!PackingSlipId.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS")</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox8</rd:DefaultName> <Top>9.14419cm</Top> <Left>0.192cm</Left> <Height>0.6cm</Height> <Width>7.73874cm</Width> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Textbox Name="Textbox9"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@SYS138394 & ": " & First(Fields!ItemId.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS")</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox9</rd:DefaultName> <Top>9.74419cm</Top> <Left>0.192cm</Left> <Height>0.6cm</Height> <Width>7.73874cm</Width> <ZIndex>1</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Tablix Name="Tablix2"> <TablixCorner> <TablixCornerRows> <TablixCornerRow> <TablixCornerCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox69"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@KPMGCommon:AnalysisCertificateTest</Value> <Style> <Color>White</Color> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox69</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>#002060</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCornerCell> <TablixCornerCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox71"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@KPMGCommon:LimitValue</Value> <Style> <Color>White</Color> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox71</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>#002060</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCornerCell> <TablixCornerCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox68"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@SYS11959</Value> <Style> <Color>White</Color> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox68</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>#002060</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCornerCell> </TablixCornerRow> </TablixCornerRows> </TablixCorner> <TablixBody> <TablixColumns> <TablixColumn> <Width>2.5cm</Width> </TablixColumn> </TablixColumns> <TablixRows> <TablixRow> <Height>0.6cm</Height> <TablixCells> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="TestResultValueReal"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Sum(Fields!TestResultValueReal.Value)</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Right</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>TestResultValueReal</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>#e1e7fb</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> </TablixCells> </TablixRow> </TablixRows> </TablixBody> <TablixColumnHierarchy> <TablixMembers> <TablixMember> <Group Name="ColumnGroup"> <GroupExpressions> <GroupExpression>=Fields!ProdId.Value</GroupExpression> </GroupExpressions> </Group> <TablixHeader> <Size>0.6cm</Size> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="ProdId"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!ProdId.Value</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>ProdId</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.ProdId</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.ProdId</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.ProdId</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>#d5d5d5</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixHeader> </TablixMember> </TablixMembers> </TablixColumnHierarchy> <TablixRowHierarchy> <TablixMembers> <TablixMember> <Group Name="RowGroup"> <GroupExpressions> <GroupExpression>=Fields!TestId.Value</GroupExpression> <GroupExpression>=Fields!ProdId.Value</GroupExpression> </GroupExpressions> </Group> <TablixHeader> <Size>3.69124cm</Size> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="TestName"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!TestName.Value</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>TestName</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.TestName</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.TestName</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.TestName</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>#7791ed</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixHeader> <TablixMembers> <TablixMember> <TablixHeader> <Size>3.50542cm</Size> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="LimitValue"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!LimitValue.Value</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>LimitValue</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.LimitValue</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.LimitValue</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.LimitValue</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>#e1e7fb</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixHeader> <TablixMembers> <TablixMember> <TablixHeader> <Size>2.5cm</Size> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="TestUnit"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!TestUnit.Value</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>TestUnit</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.TestUnit</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.TestUnit</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateLine.TestUnit</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>#e1e7fb</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixHeader> </TablixMember> </TablixMembers> </TablixMember> </TablixMembers> </TablixMember> </TablixMembers> </TablixRowHierarchy> <DataSetName>KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertifcateLinesTmp_DS</DataSetName> <Top>11.34023cm</Top> <Left>0.827cm</Left> <Height>1.2cm</Height> <Width>12.19666cm</Width> <ZIndex>2</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> </Style> </Tablix> <Textbox Name="Textbox10"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=IIf(Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value = "es",First(Fields!KPMGCommon_InstrumentsEmployed_ES.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS"),First(Fields!KPMGCommon_InstrumentsEmployed_EN.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS"))</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox10</rd:DefaultName> <Top>13.08632cm</Top> <Left>0.50949cm</Left> <Height>2.02875cm</Height> <Width>14.85604cm</Width> <ZIndex>3</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Image Name="Image2"> <Source>Embedded</Source> <Value>logo</Value> <Sizing>FitProportional</Sizing> <Top>0.125in</Top> <Left>0.06187in</Left> <Height>0.98389in</Height> <Width>1.0625in</Width> <ZIndex>4</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> </Style> </Image> <Textbox Name="Textbox1"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@KPMGCommon:CertificateAnalysisDeliveryNote & ": " & First(Fields!PackingSlipId.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS")</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox1</rd:DefaultName> <Top>0.59089cm</Top> <Left>11.50781cm</Left> <Height>0.6cm</Height> <Width>6.81269cm</Width> <ZIndex>5</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>LightGrey</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Textbox Name="Textbox2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@KPMGCommon:DelveryDateAnalysisCerfiticate & ": " & First(Fields!DeliveryDate.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS")</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox1</rd:DefaultName> <Top>1.22617cm</Top> <Left>11.50781cm</Left> <Height>0.6cm</Height> <Width>6.81269cm</Width> <ZIndex>6</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <BackgroundColor>LightGrey</BackgroundColor> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Textbox Name="Textbox3"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=First(Fields!CompanyName.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS")</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox3</rd:DefaultName> <Top>3.49249cm</Top> <Left>0.15719cm</Left> <Height>0.6cm</Height> <Width>8.69124cm</Width> <ZIndex>7</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Textbox Name="Textbox4"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Labels!@SYS26946 & ": " & First(Fields!NIFCompany.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS")</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox4</rd:DefaultName> <Top>4.09249cm</Top> <Left>0.15719cm</Left> <Height>0.6cm</Height> <Width>8.69124cm</Width> <ZIndex>8</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Textbox Name="Textbox5"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=First(Fields!CompanyAddress.Value, "KPMGCommon_AnalysisCertificateHeaderTmp_DS")</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs>
